name: Butter Pecan Delight
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Butter-Pecan Instant Pudding & Pie Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the crust: Stir pecans into flour and cut in butter until crumbly. Press mixture flat into a 9x12" pan.
2. Bake at 325°F for about 25 minutes, or until browned and nutty smelling.
3. Prepare the topping: Brown pecans with 1 Tbsp butter and light brown sugar until golden.
4. Soften cream cheese; add sour cream (optional). Mix pudding according to package directions.
5. Blend cream cheese mixture with confectioner's sugar.
6. Add Cool Whip from container to the cream cheese mixture.
7. Spread cream cheese mixture onto cooled crust, then top with pudding and remaining Cool Whip.
8. Pour cooled pecan topping over the top and chill.
Mom makes a version similar to black-bottom pie; see that recipe.
Make HALF a batch!
